nav.signUpAsOrganizerHint: Find and book suppliers for your event

hero.title: Plan any event end-to-end in one platform.
hero.subtitle: Discover verified suppliers, send one request to many, compare quotes, and book with a digital contract — all in Sevent.
hero.statValue: Verified suppliers across every category you need.

valueProp.heading: Built for Saudi events
valueProp.lede: A marketplace that treats suppliers and organizers as equals — with the trust, tools, and transparency event planning deserves.

items.title: One request, many quotes
items.body: Send a structured RFQ once. We match you with the right approved suppliers for your category, city, and date.

items.title: Compare on more than price
items.body: See line items, inclusions, travel fees, and verified reviews side-by-side so the right choice is obvious.

items.title: A platform you can rely on
items.body: Verified suppliers, click-to-agree digital contracts, and every booking tracked end-to-end.

how.heading: From first request to signed contract in days, not weeks.
how.lede: Four stages, zero spreadsheets. Whether you are planning a 30-person corporate dinner or a 1,200-guest wedding, the workflow is the same.

steps.title: Post your brief
steps.body: Tell us your date, city, guest count, and budget. Takes about 3 minutes.

steps.title: We invite the right suppliers
steps.body: Only GEA-verified vendors matching your category, capacity, and availability are contacted.

steps.title: Compare real quotes
steps.body: Line items, inclusions, deposits, and cancellation terms — all in one view.

steps.title: Book with confidence
steps.body: Sign a digital contract, pay the deposit, and track delivery milestones inside Sevent.

showcase.heading: Every quote, normalized into the same structure.
showcase.lede: No more parsing PDFs from five different caterers. Sevent pulls every quote into the same shape so you can compare the things that actually matter.

bullets.title: Line-item transparency
bullets.body: Setup, teardown, travel, and service fees are always itemized — no hidden surprises.

bullets.title: Verified reviews only
bullets.body: Reviews come from confirmed bookings on Sevent, not anonymous review sites.

bullets.title: Budget guardrails
bullets.body: Flag any quote that exceeds your stated budget range before you open it.

bullets.title: Bilingual by default
bullets.body: Every quote and contract is issued in both Arabic and English.

categories.heading: Every supplier you need, all verified.
categories.subtitle: From venues and catering to photography and staffing — every supplier is approved before they go live on Sevent.
categories.supplierCount: {count, plural, =0 {No suppliers yet} one {# verified supplier} other {# verified suppliers}}

supplierShowcase.heading: Fill your calendar with the right events.
supplierShowcase.lede: Stop chasing WhatsApp threads. Sevent matches you with organizers who meet your minimums — and handles the paperwork.

bullets.title: Qualified leads only
bullets.body: Every RFQ is filtered to your category, capacity, and service area — no irrelevant spam.

bullets.title: Get paid on time
bullets.body: Platform-mediated deposits and final payments. Your cash flow doesn't depend on a chase.

bullets.title: A profile that sells for you
bullets.body: Portfolio, packages, reviews, and bilingual copy — all in one public page.

bullets.title: Lightweight operations
bullets.body: Calendar, catalog, and quote builder replace a dozen spreadsheets.

testimonials.heading: Saudi planners and suppliers, about Sevent.

items.quote: I sent one RFQ for my daughter's wedding and had six full quotes back within a day. It would have taken two weeks of phone calls before.
items.name: Reem Al-Otaibi

items.quote: The calendar and quote builder replaced three spreadsheets and two WhatsApp groups. My team finally has time to actually cook.
items.name: Khalid Al-Najjar

items.quote: What sold me was the digital contract. No more PDFs bouncing around email — deposits land in escrow and we just cook.
items.name: Hessa Al-Dosari

faq.heading: Everything you need to know.
faq.lede: Still have questions about how the pilot works? Our team responds to every message within a business day.

items.a: The pilot is open to organizers and suppliers across Riyadh and Jeddah. We expand to the Eastern Province and Makkah Region in the next phase.

items.q: What does it cost for organizers?
items.a: Nothing. Posting RFQs, receiving quotes, and contracting through Sevent is free for organizers throughout the pilot.
Every supplier submits their commercial registration, GEA permit where applicable, VAT/ZATCA details, and a sample of past work. Our team reviews before any profile goes live.
Deposits and final payments run through platform-mediated escrow. Funds release to suppliers against milestones defined in the signed digital contract.
Yes. Every RFQ, quote, and contract is bilingual by default. Use the EN/ع switch at the top of the page to preview either.

items.q: Can I keep using my current suppliers?
items.a: Absolutely. Invite them to Sevent and they'll be fast-tracked through verification. Your existing relationships just get better tools.

pilot.title: We're opening to Riyadh and Jeddah suppliers now.
pilot.subtitle: Get a verified profile, structured RFQs, and platform-mediated bookings. No cold calls, no paper contracts.

landing.comingSoon: The pilot is opening to Riyadh + Jeddah suppliers now.

onboarding.title: Supplier onboarding
onboarding.intro: Complete three quick steps: business info, verification documents, and where you operate. Our team reviews every submission before your public profile goes live.
onboarding.step1Subtitle: These details will appear on your public profile — you can edit them later.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Pick the specific categories you work in — tighter categories attract better-matched RFQs.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: We need these documents to issue your verified-supplier badge and send your payouts.

valueHero.headline: Join the largest events marketplace in the Kingdom.

why.title: Real requests
why.desc: Organizers with real budgets across Saudi Arabia

why.title: Guaranteed payouts
why.desc: Funds held in escrow until the event completes

valueHero.footnote: Approved by the General Entertainment Authority · Operating in 12 Saudi cities

body.p1: Sevent is a marketplace connecting event organizers with verified suppliers across Saudi Arabia. By using our platform, you agree to act in good faith and follow the rules that protect both sides of every booking.
body.p2: Suppliers must keep their business information accurate, respond to requests within the stated deadlines, and deliver services exactly as described in the accepted quote. Misrepresentation of capabilities or credentials is a material breach of these terms.
body.p3: All payments flow through our escrow partner. Funds are released to the supplier only after the event is confirmed complete. Refunds and chargebacks follow the cancellation policy agreed in each booking.
body.p4: Disputes are first raised through our support team, who will attempt to mediate within 14 business days. Unresolved matters may be escalated to binding arbitration at the agreed venue.
body.p5: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any court proceedings shall be brought before the competent courts of Riyadh.

body.p1: We collect the information you provide when you register, submit documents, post content, or communicate with other users on Sevent. This includes your name, contact details, commercial registration, and any files you upload for verification.
body.p2: Your data is used to verify your identity, match suppliers to organizer requests, process payments, and improve the service. We do not sell personal information to third parties.
body.p3: We share booking-related information only with the parties directly involved in that booking — the organizer, the supplier, our verification team, and the payment processor. Limited aggregated analytics may be shared with partners to help us grow.
body.p4: Verification documents and financial records are retained for the period required by Saudi commercial law. Account data is kept for the lifetime of your account plus six months after closure, unless a longer retention is legally required.
body.p5: You can access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time from your account settings or by emailing our privacy team. We respond to all requests within 30 days.

booking.listIntro: Every quote you accept creates a booking. The supplier must confirm within the deadline or the slot is released.
booking.contractPending: Contract will be available after confirmation.
booking.downloadCompanyProfileNotReady: Company profile becomes available after quote acceptance

banner.awaitingOrganizer: Waiting on supplier confirmation — the supplier has until the deadline to confirm or decline.
banner.awaitingSupplier: Please confirm or decline this booking before the deadline.
